component.name: DeckDrop
component.summary: LAN game sharing for Steam Deck and Linux

description.p: DeckDrop lets you share games with friends on the same local network without any internet connection, accounts, or external services. Peer discovery is automatic via mDNS; transfers use BitTorrent (LAN-only, no DHT, no external trackers).

ul.li: Automatic peer discovery via mDNS – no setup required
Controller navigation for Steam Deck Gaming Mode
Dark UI accessible from any browser on the network
Steam cover art via App ID
No accounts, no internet, no DRM

description.p: Python rewrite with Preact frontend and full controller navigation support.
